features.name: Agile
features.description: Your movement stays silent. Spend a Hope to move up to Far range without rolling.

features.name: Fragile
features.description: When you take Major or worse damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Aquatic
features.description: You can breathe and move naturally underwater.

features.name: Vicious Maul
features.description: When you succeed on an attack against a target, you can **spend a Hope** to make them _Vulnerable_ and gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for this attack.

features.name: Aquatic
features.description: You can breathe and move naturally underwater.

features.name: Fragile
features.description: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Armored Shell
features.description: You resist physical damage. Mark an Armor slot to withdraw into your shell; while shelled, physical damage is reduced by your Armor Score after resistance, and you cannot act until you emerge.

features.name: Cannonball
features.description: Mark a Stress to let an ally launch you. They make an Agility or Strength attack against a target within Close range; on a hit, the target takes d12+2 physical damage using the thrower's Proficiency. Spend a Hope to also hit a second target within very close of the first for half damage.

features.name: Ocean Master
features.description: You can breathe and move naturally underwater. When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, you can temporarily _Restrain_ them.

features.name: Unyielding
features.description: When you would mark an Armor Slot, roll a **d6.** On a result of 5 or higher, reduce the severity by one threshold without marking an Armor Slot.

features.name: Carrier
features.description: You can carry up to two willing allies when you move.

features.name: Vicious Maul
features.description: When you hit, spend a Hope to make the target temporarily Vulnerable and gain +1 Proficiency on that attack.

features.name: Bird's-Eye View
features.description: You can fly at will. Once per rest while you are airborne, you can ask the GM a question about the scene below you without needing to roll. The first time a character makes a roll to act on this information, they gain advantage on the roll.

features.name: Carrier
features.description: You can carry up to two willing allies with you when you move.

features.name: Companion
features.description: When you Help an Ally, you can roll a **d8** as your advantage die.

features.name: Fragile
features.description: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Evolved
features.description:
Pick a Tier 1 Beastform option and become a larger, more powerful version of that creature. While you're in this form, you retain all traits and features from the original form and gain the following bonuses:

- A +6 bonus to damage rolls
- A +1 bonus to the trait used by this form
- A +2 bonus to Evasion

features.name: Hybrid Features
features.description: To transform into this creature, **mark an additional Stress.** Choose any two Beastform options from Tiers 1-2. Choose a total of four advantages and two features from those options.

features.name: Carrier
features.description: You can carry up to four willing allies when you move.

features.name: Demolish
features.description: Spend a Hope to move up to Far range in a straight line and attack all targets in melee along the path. On a hit, deal d8+10 physical damage using your Proficiency and make targets temporarily Vulnerable.

features.name: Undaunted
features.description: Gain +2 to all your damage thresholds.

features.name: Physical Defense
features.description: You gain a +3 bonus to your damage thresholds.

features.name: Snapping Strike
features.description: When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, you can **spend a Hope** to clamp that opponent in your jaws, making them temporarily _Restrained_ and _Vulnerable._

features.name: Carrier
features.description: You can carry up to two willing allies with you when you move.

features.name: Trample
features.description: **Mark a Stress** to move up to Close range in a straight line and make an attack against all targets within Melee range of the line. Targets you succeed against take **d8+1** physical damage using your Proficiency and are temporarily _Vulnerable_.

features.name: Carrier
features.description: You can carry up to three willing allies with you when you move.

features.name: Deadly Raptor
features.description: You can fly at will and move up to Far range as part of your action. When you move in a straight line into Melee range of a target from at least Close range and make an attack against that target in the same action, you can reroll all damage dice that rolled a result lower than your Proficiency.

features.name: Evolved
features.description:
Pick a Tier 1 or Tier 2 Beastform option and become a larger, more powerful version of that creature. While you're in this form, you retain all traits and features from the original form and gain the following bonuses:

- A +9 bonus to damage rolls
- A +2 bonus to the trait used by this form
- A +3 bonus to Evasion
- Your damage die increases by one size (d6 becomes d8, d8 becomes d10, etc.)

features.name: Hybrid Features
features.description: To transform into this creature, **mark 2 additional Stress.** Choose any three Beastform options from Tiers 1-3. Choose a total of five advantages and three features from those options.

features.name: Elusive Prey
features.description: When an attack roll against you would succeed, you can **mark a Stress** and roll a **d4.** Add the result to your Evasion against this attack.

features.name: Fragile
features.description: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Hobbling Strike
features.description: When you hit a target in melee, you can mark a Stress to make them temporarily Vulnerable.

features.name: Pack Hunting
features.description: When you hit a target an ally struck immediately before you, add a d8 to your damage roll.

features.name: Fleet
features.description: **Spend a Hope** to move up to Far range without rolling.

features.name: Takedown
features.description: **Mark a Stress** to move into Melee range of a target and make an attack roll against them. On a success, you gain a +2 bonus to your Proficiency for this attack and the target must mark a Stress.

features.name: Rampage
features.description: When you roll a 1 on a damage die, you can roll a **d10** and add the result to the damage roll. Additionally, before you make an attack roll, you can **mark a Stress** to gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for that attack.

features.name: Thick Hide
features.description: You gain a +2 bonus to your damage thresholds.

features.name: Venomous Bite
features.description: When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, the target becomes temporarily _Poisoned_. A _Poisoned_ creature takes **1d10** direct physical damage each time they act.

features.name: Webslinger
features.description: You can create a strong web material useful for both adventuring and battle. The web is resilient enough to support one creature. You can temporarily _Restrain_ a target within Close range by succeeding on a Finesse Roll against them.

features.name: Venomous Strike
features.description: Make an attack against any number of targets within Very Close range. On a success, a target is temporarily _Poisoned_. A _Poisoned_ creature takes **1d10** direct physical damage each time they act.

features.name: Warning Hiss
features.description: **Mark a Stress** to force any number of targets within Melee range to move back to Very Close range.

features.name: Devastating Strikes
features.description: When you deal Severe damage to a target within Melee range, you can **mark a Stress** to force them to mark an additional Hit Point.

features.name: Massive Stride
features.description: You can move up to Far range without rolling. You ignore rough terain (at the GM's discretion) due to your size.

features.name: Bird's-Eye View
features.description: You can fly at will. Once per rest while you are airborne, you can ask the GM a question about the scene below you without needing to roll. The first time a character makes a roll to act on this information, they gain advantage on the roll.

features.name: Hollow Bones
features.description: You gain a -2 penalty to your damage thresholds.
